description: Manual checklist and dsrs-rlmrig-plan.md reference running `cargo run --example python_types`, but no such example exists under crates/dspy-rs/examples. Either add the example or adjust checklist/plan to point at the intended Python integration demo.
title: Missing python_types example referenced in plan/manual checklist

acceptance_criteria:
1. render_prompt_value entry point
2. Style resolution with precedence
3. Renderer chain: field -> type -> builtin -> structural
4. Budget truncation (not error)
5. Proper error propagation (strict mode)
6. Integration tests for each path
7. cargo test passes
title: Implement PromptWorld::render_prompt_value pipeline

description: [DSRs: crates/dspy-rs/src/rlm/typed_rlm.rs] Implement TypedRlm<S: Signature> struct with new(agent, config) and with_agent(agent) constructors.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan (Phase 4): `TypedRlm<S>` struct + constructors in `src/typed_rlm.rs`.
- Fields: `agent: Agent<CompletionModel>`, `config: RlmConfig`, `PhantomData<S>`.
- Constructors: `new(agent, config)` + `with_agent(agent)`.
Trait bounds on `call`: `S: Signature + Clone + 'static`, `S::Input: ToBamlValue + RlmInputFields + Clone + Send + Sync`, `S::Output: BamlType + Clone`.

title: Task 4.2: Implement TypedRlm struct and constructors
